scripts.title: INTRO
scripts.content:
Hey Dr. [NAME]?

Hey Dr. [NAME], this is Rose...

I'm reaching out because we manage the Healthcare Research Division for FB and we're currently selecting TOP practices in (Area Ex. Phoenix area) for our network and we're considering the (name of the practice) to be part of it.

So, I need to schedule or coordinate a good time that works for you for a 45 minutes interview just in front of a computer.

So, my director can interview you about the practice and see if you would be a good fit.

You're the sole owner of the practice (name of the practice) Right?

Looking at his calendar, I see he has an opening at [time] or [time] on [day], which time works best for you?

So for tomorrow, are you available in the morning or afternoon?

scripts.title: Confirmation Steps
scripts.content:
So just to confirm you're the sole owner of the practice (name of practice), right?

Ok, and we're going to send you a confirmation of the meeting via text, is this the best number to send that to?

Ok great, and after the interview if you're selected, we're going to send you a confirmation email. What's the best email to send that to?

Ok great, and just so that we can share exactly what the initiative looks like... you'll have access to a computer when we call right?

Awesome... and I'm putting you in my director's calendar now. Can you do me a favor and put that in your calendar as well?

Ok great, so I have you in my director's calendar for [Day] [Time] [Time Zone]. Just be sure you're by a computer, we'll go through some questions, interview you about the practice, and see if you'll be a good fit!

scripts.title: I'm Not Interested
scripts.content:
Oh... So there's nothing to be interested in... are you familiar with the social media referral network?

Now, are you familiar at all with the social media referral network?

Ok, so currently, the only way to be found on social media is through paid ads, which are almost always funded by corporate practices.

And unfortunately, many of these corporate practices provide subpar medical experiences to their patients.

So what we're doing is, we're building a referral network within social media platforms that allows patients to discover quality private practices near them based on merit, rather than just those investing in paid content.

And that way, when patients search for a practice locally, it's someone that they're able to find based on a certain competence, a certain adequacy, and a certain distinction.

But does that clarify a little bit more about the significance of the call and what's going on?

Great, so the interview is going to be about 45 minutes; it's over the phone... What I wanted to do is coordinate a good time that works for you and my Director for sometime this week.

And for tomorrow, are you better in the mornings or afternoons?

scripts.title: What's the Social Media Referral Network?
scripts.content:
It's a referral network nationwide that utilizes social media platforms like Facebook and Instagram to allow patients to find the best in health and wellness.

To do that, we need to make sure we're only sending patients to the right practices, does that make sense?

scripts.title: No, That Still Does Not Make Sense (Second or Third Time)
scripts.content:
Got it. So, let me clarify because I'm sensing the caliber of the call isn't fully being understood:

Right now, if you've noticed when you search online, the only medical offices that come up when a patient searches locally are corporate run practices, not privately held practices such as yours. Right?

The problem is that those corporate run practices are usually a factory and leave patients with a sour taste in their mouth.

But, ironically, these same patients actually never end up at private practice with a much better experience because the search engines and social media brands have essentially sold themselves off to whoever is willing to pay.

So now, because there have been so many complaints about this issue from both Doctors AND patients, the social media referral network was created so that only the top practices that actually do qualitative work, will be seen when patients are searching.

Does that clarify a little bit more about the significance of the call?

scripts.title: Is This a Paid Thing? How Much Does This Cost?
scripts.content:
Oh, so this isn't a marketing or paid advertising thing, it's just an interview so that we can refer patients to the right practices.

Now to just confirm, you're the sole owner of the practice right?

scripts.title: Send Me an Email
scripts.content:
Oh, this isn't like an advertising thing, so I don't actually have a proposal or anything to send... it's an interview and my style of interview is very organic so I don't send pre-formulated questions or anything like that.

The interview will be more of an organic conversation exactly how you and I are talking right now.

So, all I need to do is set up a time with you when you have 40-50 minutes, and could be in front of the computer, so I could learn a bit more about you guys and see if you would be a good fit...

So for tomorrow, are you available in the morning or afternoon? / You know what I mean?

scripts.title: I'm Not Doing Anything Until You Send Me Something
scripts.content: I don't have a proposal or flyer to send over... you can google 'Facebook Healthcare' if you want to learn more in the meantime, but the truth is the interview is the best way for us to understand your practice and see if this is a good fit.

scripts.title: Let Me Talk to Our Office Manager
scripts.content: That makes sense. If the office manager handles these types of decisions, I'm happy to speak with them. I can keep it brief and make sure they understand the opportunity. Would they be available?

scripts.title: We Already Have Something Like This
scripts.content: That's great that you already have referral channels in place. We're not looking to replace anything - we're adding another layer of visibility and opportunity. Since you're already investing in growth, this complements that effort and gets your practice in front of more qualified patients.

scripts.title: Call Me Back Later
scripts.content: Absolutely, I can follow up at a time that works better for you. When would be a good time? I want to make sure we catch you when you have a moment to discuss this properly.

scripts.title: We Don't Accept New Patients
scripts.content: I understand. In that case, this may not be a fit for you right now. I appreciate your time, and if your situation changes down the road, feel free to reach out.
